name: OpenAPI/Swagger Document Exposed
description: The application exposes API inventory metadata that can accelerate endpoint and authorization testing.
remediation: Restrict API documentation to trusted users or publish a reduced public schema.

name: Spring Actuator Environment Endpoint Exposed
description: A Spring actuator endpoint appears reachable and may expose environment or configuration data.
remediation: Disable sensitive actuator endpoints or require strong administrative authentication.

name: Git Metadata Exposed
description: Git repository metadata is exposed from the web root.
remediation: Remove VCS metadata from deployed artifacts and block dotfile access at the web server.

name: GraphQL Console Exposed
description: A GraphQL endpoint or interactive console is reachable and should be included in schema-aware testing.
remediation: Disable public consoles in production and enforce authentication, query complexity limits, and operation allowlists.

name: Spring Boot Actuator Heapdump Exposed
description: Java heap dump file is exposed, allowing extraction of sensitive configuration properties, sessions, or credentials.
remediation: Restrict actuator endpoints or disable the heapdump endpoint in spring configuration.

name: Spring Cloud Gateway Routes Exposed
description: Spring Cloud Gateway routing rules are exposed, disclosing internal microservice architectures and proxy mapping rules.
remediation: Enforce authentication for the actuator endpoints or disable gateway actuators.

name: Spring Boot Actuator Beans Exposed
description: Exposed spring bean configuration list, disclosing dependencies, object mappings, and internal application components.
remediation: Disable actuator endpoints or secure with strict basic authentication.

name: Next.js SSR Cache Poisoning Vulnerability
description: The target dynamically reflects host headers in server-side rendered pages, causing potential SSR cache poisoning.
remediation: Do not trust user-controlled headers when constructing dynamic URLs. Enforce explicit host header validation.

name: AWS EC2 Metadata Service SSRF Exposure (IMDSv1)
description: The application reflects internal cloud metadata endpoint responses, exposing sensitive AWS IAM instance credentials.
remediation: Enforce AWS IMDSv2 (require token), block outgoing requests to 169.254.169.254, or enforce request validation.

name: AWS EC2 Metadata Service Token Request Exposure (IMDSv2)
description: The endpoint exposes AWS EC2 IMDSv2 token retrieval mechanism, which can be chained to gain administrative access.
remediation: Configure security groups to restrict outbound metadata requests or upgrade server-side query filters.

name: GraphQL Schema Introspection Enabled
description: GraphQL schema introspection is enabled, revealing all available queries, mutations, fields, and argument types.
remediation: Disable introspection in production environments.

name: Kubernetes Service Account Token Leaked
description: Kubernetes service account credentials token file is exposed, potentially granting root container/cluster permissions.
remediation: Restrict mounting of default service account tokens or block paths at reverse proxies.

name: Docker Private Registry Catalog Exposed
description: Docker Registry HTTP API v2 catalog is publicly accessible, disclosing custom application container repositories.
remediation: Enforce strong token-based authentication on the Docker Registry API.

name: Prometheus Metrics Endpoint Exposed
description: Application metrics containing connection counts, performance indicators, and internal configurations are exposed.
remediation: Block access to the /metrics endpoint or limit metrics scraping to trusted internal subnets.

name: HashiCorp Consul Agent Configuration Exposed
description: Consul service mesh configuration is exposed, disclosing node parameters, local checks, and coordination secrets.
remediation: Enforce ACL policies on Consul API endpoint, or restrict HTTP bindings to localhost.

name: HashiCorp Vault System Health Exposed
description: Vault health status and initialization properties are accessible, indicating presence of secret storage systems.
remediation: Enforce authorization or block unauthenticated traffic from public interfaces.

name: Elasticsearch Nodes Configuration Exposed
description: Elasticsearch cluster nodes configuration or index information is exposed, leading to database schema disclosure.
remediation: Bind Elasticsearch to localhost, enable authentication (x-pack), and restrict public API access.

name: Redis REST API or HTTP Pipeline Port Exposure
description: Redis database interface appears exposed on HTTP endpoint, potentially allowing data exfiltration or Command Injection.
remediation: Disable HTTP parser support in redis config or block public access to the Redis port.

name: Jenkins Administration Script Console Exposed
description: Unauthenticated access to the Jenkins Groovy Script Console permits Remote Code Execution (RCE) on the server.
remediation: Enable global security settings, enforce authentication, and restrict access to admin consoles.

name: phpMyAdmin Installation Setup Exposed
description: The setup configuration interface for phpMyAdmin is exposed, permitting configuration alteration or credential disclosure.
remediation: Delete the setup directory or secure it with strict IP constraints.

name: Laravel Environment Configuration Leakage
description: Laravel environment configuration credentials file is accessible, exposing databases, API keys, and app encryption keys.
remediation: Block access to dotfiles (.*) at the web server level and move the environment file outside the public root.

name: Node-RED Dashboard Console Exposed
description: Node-RED programming console is exposed, letting unauthorized visitors inject flow logic or run server scripts.
remediation: Configure adminAuth inside Node-RED settings.js configuration file.

name: Apache Solr Administration Exposed
description: Apache Solr admin console is publicly exposed, leaving cores vulnerable to unauthorized data queries and deletes.
remediation: Secure Solr Admin page using basic authentication or implement strict network level restrictions.

name: Git Repository Index File Exposed
description: Git repository index metadata file is exposed, enabling reconstructing repository structure and file names.
remediation: Block access to the /.git folder at the reverse proxy/web server configuration level.

name: PHP Information Page Exposed
description: Exposed PHP environment details, disclosing extensions, server environment values, and absolute filesystem paths.
remediation: Delete information disclosure test files or disable public accessibility.

name: Application Configuration File Leakage
description: Exposed JSON application configuration, potentially containing configuration details or internal access variables.
remediation: Remove sensitive variables from the exposed config or secure endpoint behind active authentication.

name: Docker Compose Manifest Exposed
description: Exposed Docker Compose configuration, exposing local images, container port mappings, and environment setups.
remediation: Exclude configuration blueprints and manifest templates from web server folder directories.

name: Next.js Preview Bypass Access Configuration
description: Next.js draft content preview endpoint configuration error allows unauthorized request proxy bypass.
remediation: Enforce strict verification of dynamic credentials and restrict access to dev preview handlers.
